message:
refactor(codegen): Unify comparison logic via single dispatcher

- Reduce comparison.zig from 1617 to 75 lines (-1542 lines)
- Wire all comparisons through comparison_dispatch.emitComparison()
- Add pyIdentical export to runtime for identity checks
- Fix pyIdentical to handle arrays (compare addresses)
- Enhanced containment checks for list literals

The dispatcher handles:
- Equality: primitives (native), strings (std.mem.eql), containers (pyAnyEql)
- Ordering: primitives, strings (std.mem.order), class dunders
- Containment: strings (indexOf), dicts (contains), lists (inline loop)
- Identity: None checks, literal containers, primitives, pyIdentical fallback

This eliminates 15+ specialized branches in the old comparison.zig
and provides a single unified code path aligned with CPython semantics.
